Case Quality.original_text: The wood box is nice as it keeps everything together.
My budding artist really loved the wooden box as well.
Sturdy wooden case containing all the tools needed for a young artist.
Perfect for keeping everything in one place.

Product Variety.entity: had everything I was looking for
Product Variety.original_text: This kit had everything I was looking for

Age Appropriateness.original_text: Purchase for my 6 year old grand daughter who loves art.
I was looking for an art kit for an 11 year old and most were either too childish or too complex.

Age Appropriateness.entity: not too childish or too complex
Age Appropriateness.original_text: most were either too childish or too complex. This kit had everything I was looking for
This is only for very advanced young artists.
Got this for my 10 yr old daughter.

Value.original_text: a good one to start with for the price.
it did not break the bank.

Component Quality.original_text: The quality of the markets is poor
Component Quality.improvement_wish: Improve the quality of markers to be more durable and vibrant

Component Quality.original_text: the '24 oil pastels' are NOT oil pastels - they are just 24 additional crayons
Component Quality.improvement_wish: Provide genuine oil pastels instead of mislabeled crayons

Component Quality.original_text: The little plastic scissors broke on the first use
Component Quality.improvement_wish: Make scissors more durable or include higher quality scissors

Gift Suitability.original_text: This was a Wow! gift on Christmas morning.

Beginner Friendly.original_text: Nothing elaborate about this set, but a good one to start with
